name: Hamed Razavi Khosroshahi
title: PhD Researcher in Computer Vision and AI

summary.base: PhD researcher in computer vision and AI with experience in machine learning, deep learning, neural rendering, 3D reconstruction, and scientific software development.
summary.industry: AI engineer and researcher with strong experience in Python, PyTorch, computer vision, deep learning, and 3D scene representation.
summary.research: PhD researcher specializing in neural rendering, NeRF, 3D reconstruction, and machine learning for visual computing.

education.degree: PhD in Computer Vision and AI
details: Research on neural rendering, NeRF, 3D reconstruction, and deep learning.

bullets: Conduct research in computer vision, machine learning, and neural rendering.
Develop deep learning methods for 3D scene representation and reconstruction.
Implement and evaluate research pipelines in Python and PyTorch.
Write scientific papers, technical reports, and research deliverables.
Worked on precision water and weather measurement systems.
Designed and developed sensing devices and engineering solutions.
Contributed to instrumentation, testing, and technical problem solving.

projects.name: NeRF Research
bullets: Worked on neural rendering and sparse-view 3D reconstruction.
Investigated robust scene representation methods under limited supervision.
